kirundi.assists_with_descent_and_eva_operates_: Afasha mu kumanuka na EVA, akoresha ibikoresho vya siyansi
kirundi.dark_volcanic_basalt_filled_the_moon_s: Basalt y'ibirunga yijimye yuzuye ibibaya binini vy'ingaruka vy'Ukwezi maze ikora «inyanja» zijimye (maria) zigaragara ziva ku Isi. Iyi lava yaturikiye mu myaka miliyari 3-3.5 ishize.
kirundi.lunar_soil_is_ground_up_rock_from_bill: Ubutaka bw'ukwezi ni urutare rwasekuwe ruva mu myaka miliyari z'ibitero vy'udukomeza twa meteorite. Bufite n'ubuhumyi buto bw'ikirahuri n'ibimenyetso vy'uduce tw'umuyaga w'izuba.
kirundi.apollo_17_found_orange_soil_tiny_glass: Apollo 17 yabonye ubutaka bw'icunga — ubuhumyi buto bw'ikirahuri buva mu kuturika kw'ikirunga ca kera mu myaka miliyari 3.7 ishize. Ni kimwe mu vyavumbuwe bishimishije cane vya Apollo!
kirundi.kreep_stands_for_potassium_k_rare_eart: KREEP isigura Potassium (K), Rare Earth Elements, na Phosphorus (P). Iyi mabuye y'agaciro yakoraniye mu bisigazwa vya nyuma vy'inyanja ya magma y'ukwezi.
kirundi.meteorite_impacts_melt_rock_into_glass: Ingaruka za meteorite zishongesha urutare zikaba ikirahuri, kiguruka mu kirere kikamanuka nk'uduhimba duto. Bimwe bifite gaze zafashwe ziva mu kirere ca kera c'ukwezi.
kirundi.apollo_15_found_this_4_1_billion_year_: Apollo 15 yabonye iyi anorthosite ifite imyaka miliyari 4.1, imwe mu mabuye ya kera cane yigeze gukusanywa. Yafashije kwemeza inyigisho y'inyanja ya magma ku vyerekeye iremwa ry'Ukwezi.
kirundi.apollo_missions_took_about_3_days_each: Ubutumwa bwa Apollo bwafashe nk'iminsi 3 buri cerekezo, bugenda ku muvuduko wa ~km 3,900/isaha.
kirundi.the_moon_s_gravity_is_1_6_of_earth_s_a: Imbaraga rukuruzi z'Ukwezi ni 1/6 vy'Isi. Umuntu upima kg 70 apima ~kg 12 gusa aho!
kirundi.buzz_aldrin_said_contact_light_first_b: Buzz Aldrin yavuze «Contact light» mbere, ariko interuro izwi cane ya Armstrong yatanguranye na «That's».
kirundi.the_first_stage_burned_rp_1_kerosene_w: Iciciro ca mbere catwitse kerosene RP-1 hamwe na oxygen y'amazi — toni zirenga 2,000 z'amavuta mu minota 2.5!
kirundi.sound_needs_a_medium_air_water_to_trav: Ijwi rikeneye umuvyimba (umwuka/amazi) kugira ngo rigende. Ukwezi ntigufite ikirere, bityo gucecetse rwose.
kirundi.the_oldest_moon_rocks_are_4_4_billion_: Amabuye ya kera cane y'ukwezi afite imyaka miliyari 4.4 — hafi ya kera nka Sisitemu y'Izuba!
kirundi.rotate_spacecraft_to_expose_vent_to_su: Zunguza icogajuru kugira ngo ushire umwobo w'umwuka ku zuba
kirundi.reroute_cabin_heater_duct_to_warm_the_: Yobora bundi bushasha umuyoboro w'ishusha rya kabini kugira ngo ushushe umuyoboro
kirundi.seal_the_vent_and_use_backup_waste_bag: Ugara umwobo w'umwuka maze ukoreshe imifuka y'imyanda y'inyongera
kirundi.boulder_field_at_landing_site: Umurima w'amabuye manini ku kibanza co kugwa!
kirundi.try_to_reset_the_tank_heater_circuit: Gerageza gusubiramwo uruziga rw'ishusha rya tank
kirundi.administer_anti_nausea_medication_and_: Tanga umuti urwanya iseseme n'igihe co kuruhuka
kirundi.tough_it_out_keep_working_through_the_: Ihangane — bandanya gukora nubwo hari iseseme
kirundi.reduce_visual_stimulation_and_close_wi: Gabanya gukangura kwerekana maze wugare amarido y'idirisha
kirundi.realistic_tight_fuel_budget_faster_o_d: Nyavyo — ingengo y'amavuta ifunganye, ikoreshwa ryihuse rya O₂
kirundi.animated_saturn_v_rocket_launch_sequen: Urutonde rwo kohereza roketi Saturn V rufite imikorere. Kubara hasi kw'amasegonda 5 bikurikirwa no kuzamuka binyuze mu kirere bigana ku ruziga. Yerekana uburebure, umuvuduko, imbaraga za G, n'itandukana ry'ivyiciro.
kirundi.saturn_v_3_stages_7_5_million_lbs_thru: 🚀 Saturn V • Ivyiciro 3 • Imbaraga lbs miliyoni 7.5
kirundi.watch_the_countdown_and_ascent_through: Raba kubara hasi no kuzamuka binyuze mu kirere c'Isi
kirundi.proceed_to_earth_orbit_phase_after_suc: Bandanya ku ciciro c'uruziga rw'Isi nyuma yo kohereza vyagenze neza
kirundi.animated_view_of_spacecraft_in_low_ear: Irabwa rifite imikorere ry'icogajuru mu ruziga rw'Isi rwo hasi kuri kilometero 185. CSM isoza uruziga 1.5 mu gihe idirisha ry'ukongeza rya Trans-Lunar Injection rihuza n'aho Ukwezi kuzaba. Ibara ry'uruziga, uburebure, umuvuduko, no kwitegura kwa TLI biragaragara.
kirundi.the_s_ivb_third_stage_will_fire_for_5_: Iciciro ca gatatu S-IVB kizatwika iminota 5 amasegonda 47 kugira ngo congere umuvuduko uva kuri km 28,000/isaha uje kuri km 38,900/isaha — umuvuduko wo guhunga. Iri tswika rimwe rikohereza ku nzira igana Ukwezi kuri km 384,400.
kirundi.execute_trans_lunar_injection_burn_to_: Kora itwika rya Trans-Lunar Injection kugira ngo utangure urugendo rw'iminsi 3 rugana Ukwezi
kirundi.execute_tli_burn_head_to_the_moon: 🚀 Kora Itwika rya TLI — Ja ku Kwezi
kirundi.animated_trans_lunar_coast_earth_shrin: Urugendo rwa Trans-Lunar rufite imikorere. Isi igabanuka iburyo bw'ibumoso mu gihe Ukwezi kwiyongera iburyo igihe icogajuru kigenda kilometero 384,400 mu minsi 3. Yerekana ibara ry'intera n'ibiganiro vy'ubutumwa.
kirundi.animated_view_of_spacecraft_orbiting_t: Irabwa rifite imikorere ry'icogajuru kizenguruka Ukwezi ku burebure bwa kilometero 110. Yerekana ubuso bw'ukwezi bufite ivyobo, ikibanza co kugwa c'Inyanja y'Amahoro caranzwe ku rangi ry'icatsi, n'akadomo k'icogajuru kizenguruka.
kirundi.undock_lunar_module_eagle_from_command: Tandukanya module y'ukwezi Eagle na module y'amategeko Columbia maze utangure kumanuka ku mbaraga ugana ku buso bw'ukwezi
kirundi.undock_begin_powered_descent: ⬇️ Tandukanya maze Utangure Kumanuka ku Mbaraga
kirundi.start_slowing_down_early_moon_gravity_: Tangura kugabanya umuvuduko hakiri kare — imbaraga rukuruzi z'Ukwezi zoroshe ariko nta mbabazi
kirundi.watch_your_fuel_gauge_you_can_t_thrust: Raba ikipimo c'amavuta yawe — ntushobora gusunika udafite amavuta!
kirundi.interactive_lunar_descent_piloting_gam: Umukino wo kuyobora kumanuka ku kwezi ukorana. Koresha W canke akambi ko hejuru ku mbaraga, A na D canke udukambi tw'ibumoso n'iburyo ku kwimuka ku ruhande. Gwa ufite umuvuduko uhagaze munsi ya metero 3 kuri segonda n'umuvuduko utambitse munsi ya metero 5 kuri segonda.
kirundi.begin_extravehicular_activity_moonwalk: Tangura igikorwa co hanze y'ikinyabiziga (kugenda ku kwezi) kugira ngo ushakashake ku buso bw'ukwezi maze ukusanye ingero z'ubumenyi bw'isi
kirundi.collect_rock_at_your_feet: Kusanya urutare ruri ku birenge vyawe
kirundi.look_around_click_canvas_first: Raba hirya no hino (banza ufyonde kuri canvas)
kirundi.in_one_sixth_gravity_a_hop_covers_abou: Mu mbaraga rukuruzi za kimwe ca gatandatu, gusimbuka bituma hatererwa hafi inshuro esheshatu z'intera itambitse ku mihati imwe.
kirundi.earth_hangs_in_a_fixed_spot_in_the_lun: Isi imanikwa ahantu hahoraho mu kirere c'ukwezi kuko Ukwezi kuri mu kuzunguruka guhuje (gufunzwe n'umuraba).
kirundi.webgl_failed_to_initialize_your_browse: WebGL yananiwe gutangura. Murondera wawe canke igikoresho cawe gishobora kuba kidashigikira ihutisha rya hardware ya 3D.
kirundi.interactive_3d_lunar_surface_eva_use_w: EVA ya 3D ikorana ku buso bw'ukwezi. Koresha WASD kugira ngo ugende, Space kugira ngo usimbuke mu mbaraga rukuruzi za kimwe ca gatandatu, F kugira ngo ukusanye ingero z'amabuye, n'imbeba kugira ngo urabe hirya no hino. Kusanya ingero z'ubumenyi bw'isi maze ushakashake ku buso bw'Ukwezi hafi ya module y'ukwezi.
kirundi.the_apollo_lunar_surface_experiments_p: Apollo Lunar Surface Experiments Package (ALSEP) yakoze imyaka nyuma y'uko abahanga mu kirere bagiye. Igipimo c'umutingito camenye imitingito y'ukwezi n'ingaruka za meteorite kugeza 1977.
kirundi.the_lunar_roving_vehicle_cost_38_milli: Lunar Roving Vehicle yatwaye amadolari miliyoni 38. Imodoka ya Apollo 17 yagenze km 35.7 — iracahagaze ku Kwezi ifite impfunguzo!
kirundi.lunar_seismometers_detected_deep_moonq: Ibipimo vy'umutingito vy'ukwezi vyamenye imitingito y'ukwezi ikomeye yatewe n'imbaraga z'umuraba w'Isi ku burebure bwa km 700-1100. Ukwezi kuracafite intima yashongeshejwe igice!
kirundi.animated_lunar_ascent_sequence_ascent_: Urutonde rwo kuzamuka kw'ukwezi rufite imikorere. Iciciro co kuzamuka kiguruka kiva ku Kwezi gisiga iciciro co kumanuka inyuma, kizamuka kigana uruziga rw'ukwezi hejuru ya kilometero 60, hanyuma kigakora guhura-guhuza na module y'amategeko Columbia izenguruka. HUD yerekana uburebure, iciciro, n'intera igana CSM.
kirundi.ascent_stage_launches_from_moon_docks_: Iciciro co kuzamuka kiguruka kiva ku Kwezi kandi gihuzwa na Columbia
kirundi.the_lm_s_ascent_engine_a_single_start_: Moteri yo kuzamuka ya LM — moteri ya hypergolic yo gutangura rimwe idafite uburyo bwo guhagarika — itwika kugira ngo ikohereze uva ku buso bw'ukwezi. Iciciro co kumanuka gikora nk'ikibanza co kohereza kandi gisigara inyuma. Uhura kandi uhuzwa na Columbia, hanyuma ujugunya «Eagle» (iyo amaherezo igwa ku Kwezi).
kirundi.fire_trans_earth_injection_burn_to_beg: Twika itwika rya Trans-Earth Injection kugira ngo utangure urugendo rw'iminsi 3 rwo gusubira mu rugo
kirundi.tei_burn_head_home: 🚀 Itwika rya TEI — Ja mu Rugo
kirundi.the_service_module_engine_fires_for_th: Moteri ya module ya serivisi itwika kuri Trans-Earth Injection. Ureremba uja ku Isi mu minsi 3, ujugunya module ya serivisi, maze utegure module y'amategeko ku kongera kwinjira — iciciro giteye akaga cane c'ubutumwa.
kirundi.begin_atmospheric_re_entry_sequence_at: Tangura urutonde rwo kongera kwinjira mu kirere kuri kilometero 39,900 ku isaha
kirundi.animated_re_entry_sequence_command_mod: Urutonde rwo kongera kwinjira rufite imikorere. Module y'amategeko yinjira mu kirere kuri km 39,900/isaha hamwe n'ubushuhe bwa plasma bugera kuri dogere 2,760. Yerekana ihagarara ry'amaradiyo, parashuti zo mbere, parashuti nkuru, no kumanuka mu mazi y'inyanja.
kirundi.watch_the_command_module_survive_re_en: Raba module y'amategeko irokoka kongera kwinjira inyuze muri plasma ya 2,760°C kuri km 39,900/isaha, yugurura parashuti, kandi imanuka mu Nyanja ya Pasifika.
kirundi.complete_the_mission_with_pacific_ocea: Soza ubutumwa wamanuka mu mazi y'Inyanja ya Pasifika. Ikaze mu rugo, Muyobozi!
kirundi.welcome_home_commander_the_world_celeb: Ikaze mu rugo, Muyobozi. Isi irizihiza.
kirundi.reset_and_start_a_new_moon_mission_fro: Subiramwo maze utangure ubutumwa bushasha bw'ukwezi uhereye ku ntanguriro
kirundi.tsiolkovsky_rocket_equation_adjust_mas: Ingingo ya roketi ya Tsiolkovsky. Hindura igipimo c'ubwinshi, igihe co gutwika, n'imbaraga zihariye (Isp). Igisubizo gitandukanye c'imimerere 3 cerekana nimba delta-V yawe idahagije, igera kuri LEO, canke ihunga Isi. Nta manota, nta gushira ahagaragara.
kirundi.hypothesis_free_text_no_right_answer_w: Iciyumviro (umwandiko wisanzuye — nta gisubizo ciza): Ni iyihe nkoni y'ingenzi cane?
kirundi.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Fata uduce tubiri twa sliders ushimangiye. Wimure kamwe. Raba.
kirundi.which_slider_affects_v_the_most_use_th: Ni iyihe slider igira ingaruka kuri Δv cane? Koresha inyandiko.
kirundi.real_spacecraft_trade_fuel_mass_agains: Icogajuru nyaco cimuranya ubwinshi bw'amavuta na Isp. Shakashaka impamvu.
kirundi.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_mass_: Sigura mu magambo yawe bwite: ese igipimo c'ubwinshi, igihe co gutwika, na Isp bikorana bite?
kirundi.design_note_discrete_3_state_outcome_n: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: igisubizo gitandukanye c'imimerere 3; nta manota; nta gushira ahagaragara — ku bushake.
